mapper.sql: default_id, endpoint_name, endpoint_label, extra_params, default_value, default_label, show_in_ui, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: select from biz_d365_default_value where default_id = #{defaultId} and del_flag = '0'
select from biz_d365_default_value where endpoint_name = #{param1} and (extra_params = #{param2} or (#{param2} is null and extra_params is null)) and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from biz_d365_default_value where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and default_value is not null and default_value != '' order by default_id
mapper.insert: insert into biz_d365_default_value (endpoint_name, endpoint_label, extra_params, default_value, default_label, show_in_ui, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{endpointName}, #{endpointLabel}, #{extraParams}, #{defaultValue}, #{defaultLabel}, #{showInUi}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: update biz_d365_default_value set del_flag = '2' where default_id in #{id}
